purpose: Container for 10 organ nodes with explicit real/stub/locked semantics.
truth_rules: All organ nodes must expose explicit integration status.
No implicit readiness from node color or glow.
proof_requirements: Registry and inventory must list 10 organ nodes.
fake_green_risks: Unimplemented organs can look active without explicit stub labels.
accessibility_rules: State must not be encoded by color alone.
RU/EN labels must remain explicit for status tags.
change_safety: Topology hardening scope only; no final UI readiness claims.
